mapper.select: select out_put_id, alarm_type from t_data_out_warn union all select out_put_id, alarm_type from t_data_out_alarm where alarm_status = 0
select deal_id, deal_user_id, deal_info, deal_time from t_data_out_alarm_deal where alarm_id = #{alarmId} order by deal_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_data_out_alarm_deal (deal_id, alarm_id, deal_user_id, deal_info, deal_time) values (#{deal.dealId}, #{alarmId}, #{deal.dealUserId}, #{deal.dealInfo}, #{deal.dealTime})
